meaning: [生化]vi.(植物等)进行光合作用,实行光能合成;vt.(通过)光合(作用)产生
examples: Even it is a leaf, it must try to photosynthesize. — That Love Comes.
It gets worse: If mirror cells acquired the ability to photosynthesize, we'd be screwed.
The plant can then reach the light faster and photosynthesize and synthesize more chlorophyll.
Rust causes infected leaves to fall off, leaving the trees with less capacity to photosynthesize, or produce energy.
Ozone interferes with the ability of vegetation to photosynthesize.
